_comment_phoneNumbers: The Vapi number(s) this client answers on. Used to route an inbound call to this config. For browser/test use, leave and select by clientId.
_comment_services: Optional — if omitted, the industry playbook's defaults are used.
_comment_faqs: Exact answers the receptionist may give verbatim. It will NOT invent anything outside these + services + hours.
_comment_voiceId: Optional per-client ElevenLabs voice (e.g. a clone of the owner's voice). Falls back to the global ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID if empty.
_comment_overrides: Anything here overrides the industry playbook. Leave blank to use playbook defaults.
